scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='*.scss' src/ dist/ && cp ../../../src/wmcads/assets/sass/shared/_vars.scss src/_vars.scss && cp ../../../src/wmcads/assets/sass/shared/_mixins.scss src/_mixins.scss && cp ../../../src/wmcads/assets/sass/wmca/_vars.scss src/_wmca_vars.scss && sass src/_package.scss dist/feedback-loop.min.css --no-source-map --style=compressed --load-path=src --load-path=../../../src/wmcads/assets/sass/wmca && node ../../../scripts/render-packages-njk.js
